semantic_sweep.review_note: Reviewed the complete chapter, all fourteen assigned source notes and mapping limits, the seven exact inherited suites, all 22 retained legacy SelfImprovement declarations, the two refinement theorems, the independent eight-stage/118-route consumer, 129 rejecting mutations, full-state and replacement-outcome handoffs, every manifest atom, all current prose scanner candidates, test plan, source crosswalk, summary, and handoff. The review preserves promotion legitimacy under self-reference as the distinct owner, upgrades only the finite authored-record invariant, records trusted objective/state/evaluator/monitor/effect inputs, and leaves natural useful improvement, competence, live enforcement, recovery, safety, transfer, support, and release unproved.

scope.population: System-generated or system-implemented changes to models, optimizers, schedulers, RNG state, data, caches, prompts, policies, tools, credentials, evaluators, benchmarks, routes, memory, interfaces, architecture, governance artifacts, and acknowledged descendants for a declared consumer and use.
scope.environment: Fourteen reviewed source notes; seven exact inherited finite suites; 22 retained legacy declarations; two refinement theorems; one independently encoded eight-stage/118-route consumer; 129 rejecting mutations; and a future preregistered natural effect-bearing campaign. No deployed recursive self-improvement environment is represented.
scope.model: A prospectively scoped eight-stage proposal-to-outcome/readmission contract over self-model, mutable/protected partition, exact change lineage, full declared state, evaluator and monitor dependencies, boundary deltas, matched evidence, bounded replacement handoff, returned outcome, rollback/compensation, descendant invalidation, and versioned readmission. The implementation covers only finite authored fields and fixed local results.
scope.authority: Human or institutional governance freezes consumer/use, protected partition, authority envelope, objective, risk class, recursive depth, evaluator policy, task distribution, comparators, gates, exposure, stop, recovery, rights, evidence ceiling, and publication; candidate, proposer, implementer, evaluator, monitor, approver, promoter, recovery, compensation, descendant, Evidence State, and release owners remain separately named with dependencies disclosed.
scope.time: Semantic review current through 2026-07-16; self-model, inventory, objective, authority, evaluator, monitor, protocol, task distribution, baseline, gate, exposure, outcome delay, threat model, ontology, dependencies, environment, lifecycle, and support ceiling are frozen prospectively and expire after material change.
scope.artifact: Chapter and manifest contract; fourteen reviewed source mappings; the inherited transition, readiness, replacement, trace, intent, update, and Open-Ended Improvement results; lean/AsiStackProofs/SelfImprovement.lean; lean/AsiStackProofs/SelfImprovementRefinement.lean; schemas/self_improvement_refinement.schema.json; scripts/validate_self_improvement_refinement.py; experiments/self_improvement_refinement/results/2026-07-16-local.json; docs/self_improvement_refinement.md; the model-adequacy dossier; and future natural workload, evaluator, monitor, effect, recovery, replication, and transfer bundles.

assumptions: A useful prospective self-model, mutable/protected partition, material state inventory, authority envelope, and outside-inventory residual can be frozen without claiming open-world completeness.

Independent-enough evaluator and monitor implementations can be built and their shared model, code, data, infrastructure, organizational, incentive, funding, and reporting dependencies measured rather than hidden behind role names.

Natural effect-bearing improvement tasks can produce observable utility, regression, authority, safety, deception, delayed-effect, recovery, rights, and total-cost outcomes under matched exposure and budgets.
Strong fixed-system, human-authored, conventional CI/CD, archive-search, and current-system comparators can be run with the same tasks, models, resources, outcome windows, and promotion ceilings.
Declared descendants, caches, qualifications, permissions, releases, and external effects can be acknowledged well enough to measure invalidation and expose the remaining unknown closure.
Normative choices about protected invariants, rights, stop authority, acceptable residuals, compensation, and promotion remain explicit premises rather than empirical discoveries.
chapter_defaults.strongest_counterclaim: Ordinary version control, CI/CD, access control, code review, independent benchmark suites, sandboxing, progressive delivery, incident response, checkpointing, and human approval already provide the useful update boundary; the proposed self-reference contract cannot prove its own protected partition or evaluator independence, adds correlated bureaucracy and latency, and may suppress useful improvement without preventing a capable system from gaming or routing around finite gates.
chapter_defaults.falsifier: A reachable ordinary or adversarial trace violates any prospectively frozen self-model, partition, lineage, state, dependency, invariant, evaluator, authority, evidence, exposure, stop, rollback, compensation, descendant, rights, cost, or terminal-outcome rule; a required field has no exercised producer, consumer, owner, or observed consequence; a candidate shapes its own admission conditions; or a strong simpler comparator dominates the preregistered joint frontier.

required_lanes.necessity: Freeze current self-modification, agent-design search, R&D automation, CI/CD, progressive-delivery, evaluator, corrigibility, deception, and embedded-agency comparators without importing source-reported gains or novelty.
Justify protected partitions, authority and recursive-depth limits, rights, independent review thresholds, stop authority, acceptable residuals, compensation, and who may authorize promotion.

Model admission and replacement as separate state machines with dependency-aware evaluator authority, prospective state, temporal exposure, invalidation, compensation, terminality, countermodels, and explicit limits on open-world completeness.

Exercise a real candidate-authored change, separately implemented evaluator and monitor, frozen baselines, boundary attacks, staged exposure, delayed outcome, exact declared-state restore, descendant invalidation, external-effect residual, and append-only terminal receipts.

Measure useful task success, regression, unsafe release, evaluator error, deception/sandbagging indicators, delayed harm, latency, compute, human labor, verification and recovery burden, rights impact, availability, and total cost jointly.

Ablate prospective freezing, evaluator separation, dependency disclosure, protected partitions, full-state inventory, boundary review, delayed monitoring, descendant invalidation, compensation, and negative-result retention under matched work.

Repeat across models, task classes, change classes, evaluators, organizations, infrastructures, threat models, environments, recursive depths, horizons, authorities, and time with independent implementations and replayers.

contrary_evidence: Git, code review, CI/CD, sandboxing, access control, progressive delivery, checkpointing, and incident response already implement substantial update governance without a new self-improvement abstraction.

Darwin Gödel Machine and ADAS report scoped empirical gains from archive-based code or agent-design search, showing that simpler fixed search controllers can produce improvements without this admission contract.
The candidate, evaluator, monitor, and governor may share models, data, infrastructure, organizations, incentives, or blind spots even when their records use different identities.
No finite declared partition or self-model can prove that it contains every causally relevant part of an embedded system or every external effect.
Short canaries and fixed benchmarks can miss deception, sandbagging, rare harms, distribution shift, ontology drift, and delayed behavior.
Exact checkpoint or declared-tree restoration cannot undo copied information, privacy loss, downstream beliefs and decisions, recipient state, or physical effects.
Fail-closed governance can reduce useful throughput, availability, contestability, and correction while shifting labor and cost to humans.
Current local evidence is synthetic record validation, finite Boolean routing, and non-recursive update transactions, not an effect-bearing self-proposed improvement.
known_confounds: The protected partition, task distribution, baselines, outcome horizon, recursive depth, and material state inventory can be narrowed after failures are observed.
Candidate and evaluator performance may reflect model scale, prompt access, tools, compute, human intervention, data leakage, contamination, or search budget rather than the governance mechanism.
Independent-looking evaluators may share causal dependencies or receive candidate-selected evidence.
Fail-closed routes can look safe by releasing nothing, avoiding hard tasks, shortening exposure, or excluding risky populations.
Checkpoint equality can hide non-model state, external effects, backups, caches, descendants, privacy loss, and semantic drift.
Candidate survivorship can erase compile failures, timeouts, rejected repairs, null arms, incidents, and total search cost.
Monitor and evaluator attacks can be absent from the workload, or delayed outcomes can occur after the frozen window.
Rights, privacy, availability, human labor, compensation, governance delay, and opportunity cost can be omitted or shifted outside the measured system.
acceptance_criteria: Every frozen scope, self-model, state surface, lineage, dependency, invariant, authority, evaluator, comparator, exposure, stop, rollback, compensation, descendant, evidence, cost, and residual field has an exact producer, consumer, owner, valid case, rejecting mutation, and observed consequence.

A preregistered natural effect-bearing campaign meets every joint usefulness, regression, unsafe-release, evaluator, deception, delayed-effect, recovery, rights, availability, cost, causal-ablation, independent-replication, and transfer gate against all frozen strong baselines.

The chapter's distinct self-reference admission mechanism has a predicted causal signature that disappears under the matched ablation and cannot be explained by abstention, non-release, easier tasks, extra compute, hidden human labor, or evaluator correlation.
narrowing_criteria: Narrow every result to exact consumer/use, self-model, mutable/protected partition, authority, change class, model, evaluator dependency graph, task distribution, comparator, environment, recursive depth, horizon, exposure, state inventory, observed effects, costs, and residuals.

Separate proposal quality, implementation correctness, evaluator score, admission eligibility, replacement execution, canary observation, declared-state restoration, semantic recovery, compensation, support movement, and release authority.
Unknown partition, state, dependency, delayed effect, descendant, rights, recovery, cost, replication, or transfer remains blocked, residual, narrowed, or refuted rather than inferred safe.
refutation_criteria: Refute an invariant when a reachable ordinary or adversarial trace violates it or a named authority/field lacks an exercised effect.

Refute a mechanism benefit when its matched ablation preserves every frozen joint outcome, the mechanism worsens the joint frontier, or its predicted effect is explained by non-release, easier work, extra resources, or hidden human intervention.

Refute safe, general, reversible, independent, superiority, or transfer language when the candidate controls a gate, a material state/effect is missed, a simpler baseline dominates, delayed harm appears, or independent replication/transfer fails.
deprecation_criteria: Deprecate only when a more precise field, replacement, open-ended-campaign, security, evaluator, update-state, rights, evidence, readiness, or release owner supersedes the atom and every consumer migrates with lineage.

reproduction.environment_lock: repository-local Python environment plus exact inherited validators and recorded source digests
reproduction.evaluator_identity: independently encoded deterministic finite-record consumer; not a competent natural-task evaluator

residual.next_unblocking_condition: Freeze and run the non-deployed natural candidate-authored change campaign with separately implemented evaluators and monitors, strong fixed and search baselines, protected-partition and gate attacks, delayed outcomes, joint metrics, exact declared-state restore, descendant invalidation, external-effect compensation, causal ablations, independent replication, recursive-depth checks, and transfer.

non_claims: Semantic review, a schema, signature, compiler pass, sandbox, green gate, canary, monitor silence, checkpoint equality, finite theorem, source citation, archive score, human-looking approval, or zero detected incident does not establish safe, useful, general, corrigible, reversible, independent, or authorized recursive improvement.

The current 3 accepted and 10 rejected fixtures, 22 theorem declarations, static report import, and local update transactions establish only their exact finite record, route, declared-state restore, and descendant-invalidation observations.
No support state, readiness, authority, deployment, publication, AGI, or ASI claim changes without its separate owner and accepted evidence transition.

recursive-self-improvement-boundaries.co.strongest_counterclaim: Existing update governance supplies the useful controls, while this contract cannot prove partition completeness or evaluator independence and adds cost without stopping capable gaming.
recursive-self-improvement-boundaries.co.falsifier: Any candidate controls a frozen admission condition, any material state/effect/descendant is missed, any protected or authority boundary is laundered, or a strong simpler baseline dominates the joint frontier.
acceptance_criteria: Meet all frozen natural-task usefulness, safety, evaluator, delayed-effect, recovery, rights, cost, causal, replication, recursive-depth, and transfer gates against strong comparators.

recursive-self-improvement-boundaries.pr.strongest_counterclaim: Current self-modifying systems remain bounded development tools whose operators retain authority, so no distinct self-reference admission problem is material in the declared scope.
recursive-self-improvement-boundaries.pr.falsifier: A dated audit of representative systems finds no candidate influence over objective, evaluator, evidence, state, authority, exposure, recovery, descendants, or retained outcomes.
acceptance_criteria: Complete a dated comparator audit and retain only the exact unresolved self-reference admission boundary.

recursive-self-improvement-boundaries.in.strongest_counterclaim: A properly configured composition of version control, CI/CD, code review, access control, sandboxing, benchmark suites, progressive delivery, checkpointing, and incident response supplies every named property at lower cost.
recursive-self-improvement-boundaries.in.falsifier: A matched conventional composition exercises every named property and joint outcome without the distinct self-reference admission mechanism.
acceptance_criteria: Reproduce strong conventional and current self-modification baselines before claiming a distinct gap or advantage.

recursive-self-improvement-boundaries.mi.strongest_counterclaim: The proposed minimum remains governance theater unless a real candidate-authored change, separate evaluator, observed effect, failure injection, restore, invalidation, and compensation residual execute end to end.
recursive-self-improvement-boundaries.mi.falsifier: Any named minimum component lacks a producer, consumer, observed consequence, clean rerun, or exact non-claim boundary.
acceptance_criteria: Execute the exact non-deployed slice with one real patch, separate evaluator, strong baseline, injected failure, declared-state restore, descendant invalidation, external-effect residual, and append-only terminal receipts.

recursive-self-improvement-boundaries.be.strongest_counterclaim: The proposed market is dominated by simpler controls, cannot establish its own trust roots, and compounds latency, correlated evaluation, privacy, bureaucracy, and false quarantine as recursive depth grows.
recursive-self-improvement-boundaries.be.falsifier: Any joint gate fails, a mechanism lacks its predicted causal signature, delayed or composed harm escapes, a simpler baseline dominates, or independent replication, recursive-depth robustness, or transfer fails.
acceptance_criteria: Complete the preregistered multi-comparator causal, independently replicated, recursive-depth and transfer program and meet every frozen joint gate.

recursive-self-improvement-boundaries.in.strongest_counterclaim: Candidate participation can be safely broad if human operators retain nominal final approval.
recursive-self-improvement-boundaries.in.falsifier: The candidate or a dependent proxy controls any load-bearing admission condition while the transition advances, or removing the separate authority has no effect on outcomes.
acceptance_criteria: Exercise candidate attempts to alter every admission condition and show separately authorized enforcement, not wording, blocks advancement.

recursive-self-improvement-boundaries.in.strongest_counterclaim: A complete dependency and state inventory can be established for the bounded execution environment.
recursive-self-improvement-boundaries.in.falsifier: Prose or machinery treats an unenumerated surface as preserved, safe, or recovered rather than residual.
acceptance_criteria: Keep completeness scoped to the prospective inventory and expose every discovered outside-inventory effect without retroactive denominator changes.

recursive-self-improvement-boundaries.in.strongest_counterclaim: Separate processes, prompts, or role identities are sufficient evaluator independence for bounded updates.
recursive-self-improvement-boundaries.in.falsifier: A disclosed shared dependency creates correlated error or candidate influence while the evaluator is still labeled independent.
acceptance_criteria: Measure dependency-specific correlated failure and candidate influence with independently implemented evaluator and monitor controls.

recursive-self-improvement-boundaries.in.strongest_counterclaim: A long enough clean monitor and exact state digest are adequate operational success criteria.
recursive-self-improvement-boundaries.in.falsifier: The chapter or system infers semantic preservation, harmlessness, complete mediation, or recovery from silence or equality alone.
acceptance_criteria: Use effect-bearing delayed and adversarial outcomes and keep digest claims limited to exact inventoried surfaces.

recursive-self-improvement-boundaries.in.strongest_counterclaim: Restoring the authoritative checkpoint and dependent local tree is operationally equivalent to rollback.
recursive-self-improvement-boundaries.in.falsifier: Any copied information, external decision, recipient, privacy, human, or physical effect persists without remediation, compensation, disclosure, or residual ownership while rollback is called complete.
acceptance_criteria: Recompute exact declared restoration and separately close or own every external and irreversible effect.

recursive-self-improvement-boundaries.in.strongest_counterclaim: Invalidating known child checkpoints is enough because unrecorded descendants are outside the governed scope.
recursive-self-improvement-boundaries.in.falsifier: Any acknowledged descendant, cache, qualification, permission, or release remains usable after its ancestor loses authority.
acceptance_criteria: Exercise affected-path propagation and acknowledgement across every declared descendant class while exposing unknown closure.

recursive-self-improvement-boundaries.fa.strongest_counterclaim: Current bounded coding and agent-design systems lack the capability or incentive for meaningful sandbagging, deception, or monitor manipulation.
recursive-self-improvement-boundaries.fa.falsifier: A calibrated long-horizon campaign finds the failure below the frozen materiality threshold across capable elicitation and monitor-attack controls.
acceptance_criteria: Run hidden/shifted tasks, capability elicitation, delayed outcomes, and monitor/evaluator attack controls with calibrated detection error.

recursive-self-improvement-boundaries.fa.strongest_counterclaim: Competent operators already distinguish artifact validation from promotion evidence.
recursive-self-improvement-boundaries.fa.falsifier: A dated audit finds no promotion or safety inference from compilation, schemas, formal routes, static reports, sandbox survival, or short monitoring.
acceptance_criteria: Audit every promotion surface and inject false-green artifacts that must remain non-promoting.

recursive-self-improvement-boundaries.fa.strongest_counterclaim: The prospective inventory can include every material effect for a sufficiently isolated non-deployed update.
recursive-self-improvement-boundaries.fa.falsifier: An effect-complete isolated campaign restores every frozen material surface and leaves no external effect or unresolved residual.
acceptance_criteria: Inject local and external effects, restore declared state, and separately measure remediation, compensation, disclosure, and residual closure.

recursive-self-improvement-boundaries.fa.strongest_counterclaim: Field-local admission plus dependency review composes safely for the bounded recursive depths considered.
recursive-self-improvement-boundaries.fa.falsifier: Matched multi-field and multi-generation tests find no material interaction beyond local predictions at the frozen power threshold.
acceptance_criteria: Run cross-field, feedback-loop, and multi-generation compositions with explicit depth, interaction, and stop controls.

recursive-self-improvement-boundaries.fo.strongest_counterclaim: The theorem merely assumes a preservation predicate and projects its conclusion; it proves no invariant semantics, transition reachability, or preservation mechanism.
recursive-self-improvement-boundaries.fo.falsifier: The theorem is described as runtime or semantic preservation, has no real consumer, or a richer model shows the predicate is insufficient.
acceptance_criteria: Keep only as an honestly named schema lemma with a consumer or replace it with transition semantics, reachable countermodels, and runtime refinement.

recursive-self-improvement-boundaries.fo.strongest_counterclaim: The theorem assumes SoleSelfEvaluationBlocksPromotion and projects false promotion; it neither defines sole evaluation nor enforces authority separation.
recursive-self-improvement-boundaries.fo.falsifier: The theorem is presented as evaluator independence or blocking behavior, lacks a consumer, or a dependent evaluator can satisfy the Boolean record.
acceptance_criteria: Model evaluator dependencies and promotion authority, connect to an executable consumer, and mutation-test self and proxy evaluation paths.

recursive-self-improvement-boundaries.fo.strongest_counterclaim: The route is an ordered Boolean decision tree whose fields are trusted and whose complete branch promotes without modeling temporal effects, dependency-aware independence, authority enforcement, recursive depth, or recovery.
recursive-self-improvement-boundaries.fo.falsifier: A reachable trace passes the Boolean envelope while violating the prose contract, or no executable consumer refines the route.
acceptance_criteria: Add explicit admission/replacement state machines, dependency graph, temporal exposure, invalidation and compensation semantics, countermodels, and runtime refinement checks.

prose_review_lineage.retired_sentence: It must exercise a rejected or canary-only admission, exact

preserved_disposition.rationale: Restates one required behavior in the minimum slice.

prose_review_lineage.retirement_reason: The minimum-implementation surface was rewritten to distinguish the completed finite-record lifecycle from the still-unrun empirical minimum.

prose_review_lineage.retired_sentence: These Lean hooks still include projection-only traceability for v1.0 and must remain explicitly scoped.

preserved_disposition.rationale: Accurate scope report about the existing Lean hooks.

prose_review_lineage.retirement_reason: The formal audit now distinguishes 22 frozen legacy declarations from two reachable-lifecycle refinement theorems and an independent consumer.

prose_review_lineage.retired_sentence: `authority_widening_without_review_route_is_blocked` checks an improvement-boundary decision envelope: if a proposed change widens authority and has no explicit review route, the safe route must be `blockedForReview`.

preserved_disposition.rationale: Exact report of a finite Lean route theorem.

prose_review_lineage.retirement_reason: The individual legacy-route narration was replaced by reviewed lineage plus the connected refinement lifecycle; the legacy theorem remains retained in the proof registry.

prose_review_lineage.retired_sentence: Together the module proves only that the modeled record shapes can express protected-invariant preservation, sole-self-evaluation blocking, review-missing authority-widening rejection, evaluator-missing lifecycle blocking, canary-monitor rollback, and explicit transition routing for declared records.

preserved_disposition.rationale: Exact bounded summary of what the current Lean module expresses.

prose_review_lineage.retirement_reason: The bounded formal summary was rewritten around the exact eight-stage refinement and its trusted-input boundary.

prose_review_lineage.retired_sentence: It does not prove evaluator independence in practice, runtime self-improvement safety, rollback execution, verification-budget preservation, boundary-delta adequacy, monitor quality, or phase-gate completion.

preserved_disposition.rationale: Explicit non-claim limiting the current formal artifacts.

prose_review_lineage.retirement_reason: The old non-claim was replaced by the broader exact trusted-input and empirical-exclusion boundary for the refinement.

non_claims: This semantic sweep does not promote the chapter, establish novelty, evaluator independence, safe self-modification, corrigibility, general improvement, effect-complete recovery, deployment readiness, AGI, or ASI.
All source-reported results, synthetic fixtures, finite theorems, static imports, checkpoint restores, and descendant invalidations remain limited to their exact recorded scope.

Negative, null, deceptive, delayed, missed-state, correlated-evaluator, false-release, rollback, descendant, external-effect, privacy, rights, availability, labor, compensation, and irreversible outcomes remain visible and cannot be relabeled as successful improvement.
